description: An AXI-style source deasserts valid before the receiver raises ready, causing the transfer to be lost.
expected_root_cause: valid drops before ready in AXI-style handshake
failure_log:
UVM_ERROR: VALID deasserted before READY handshake completed.
ASSERTION FAILED: valid must remain high until ready is asserted.
COVERAGE: 51.0
rtl: module axi_source(input logic clk, input logic reset_n, input logic ready, input logic [31:0] data_in, output logic valid, output logic [31:0] data); always @(posedge clk) begin if (!reset_n) begin valid <= 0; data <= '0; end else if (data_in != '0) begin valid <= 1; data <= data_in; end else if (!ready) begin valid = 0; end end endmodule
success_log:
UVM_INFO: AXI handshake completed without protocol violations.
ASSERTION PASSED: valid held until ready.
COVERAGE: 89.0
testbench: AXI handshake test expects valid to remain asserted until ready is observed.
title: AXI valid drops before ready
